headline: Inca Empire
description: The Inca Empire (1438-1533) was the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, stretching along the Andes from Colombia to Chile. Engineering marvels: Machu Picchu, 40,000 km of roads (Qhapaq Ñan), terraced agriculture. No wheel, no writing system (used quipu: knotted strings for records). Conquered by Francisco Pizarro (1532).

citation.name: The Last Days of the Incas (Kim MacQuarrie)
The Inca Empire: A Very Short Introduction (2025)
citation.author: multiple
